# Sprint 0.2 Data Ingestion Strategy

**Sprint:** Sprint 0. Platform Foundation
**Objective:** Establish the foundation for the IoT and Remote Patient Monitoring data platform.

## Description
Define the data ingestion strategy, including micro-batch and streaming ingestion modes, and implement Snowpipe for automatic data loading.

## Deliverable
Documented data ingestion strategy
